title: The American Legion
body:
The American Legion is the nation's largest veterans service organization, representing nearly 2 million members across thousands of posts worldwide. Post 118 has proudly served the veterans and community of Hendricks County for generations.

We advocate for veterans' benefits and legislation at all levels, provide claims assistance and veterans services, fund the O'Malley Scholarship and youth programs, and host community events, dinners, and programs right here at Post 118.

Whether you're a veteran looking for support, a community member wanting to give back, or someone interested in the Legion's mission, we'd love to meet you.
